chapter_title.en: Chapter on Recognizing the Major Sins for Which Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Threatened with Hellfire

text: 4957 - وَ قَالَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "مَنْ مَشَى إِلَى صَاحِبِ بِدْعَةٍ فَوَقَّرَهُ فَقَدْ سَعَى فِي هَدْمِ اَلْإِسْلاَمِ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4957 - Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
"Whoever walks towards a person of innovation and shows him respect has indeed contributed to the destruction of Islam."
